comments.original: Funny thing about money – it almost seems sentient sometimes! Each pay bump comes hand-in-hand with sneaky new 'essentials', whether beefier savings goals because oh boy does life like curveballs, or splashing out on mental decompress after crunch time at work keeps getting crunchier. Not solely chasing numbers but peace of mind matters heaps too!
